Software Engineer, New Grad

Notion San Francisco, CA
Who We Are

Notion is the collaborative AI workspace where teams and agents think together.

About the Role
We're looking for a New Grad Software Engineer to help us build the future of productivity.

What you'll do
  • Ship product surfaces end-to-end across React, Node, and Postgres.
  • Own the technical design of a feature from sketch to launch.
  • Pair with senior engineers on ambiguous, high-leverage problems.
What we're looking for
  • Strong fundamentals in data structures and systems thinking.
  • Recent or upcoming BS/MS graduate from an accredited program.
Seniority level: Entry level
